name: imp-universal-bot
description: Monorepo for Telegram and VK bots, and Angular MiniApp

scripts.dev:tg: dotenv -- env VK_TOKEN='' VK_GROUP_ID='' tsx apps/bot/src/index.ts
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json dist && find . -name "*.tsbuildinfo" -delete && npm i

author: Valentin <valentin.distortion@gmail.com> (https://github.com/vdistortion)
